login.title: Welcome!
login.description: Log in to continue to your dashboard.
login.error: Unable to sign in. Please check your credentials and try again.

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Sign up to get started with your dashboard.
register.name: Full name
register.success: Your account has been created successfully.
register.error: Unable to create your account. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.success: A password reset link has been sent to your email address.
forgotPassword.error: Unable to send a reset link. Please try again.

showcase.headline: Ship faster with a production-ready Next.js foundation.
showcase.description: TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui, TanStack Query, i18n, and opinionated architecture — ready to build on.
